meta.title: Minh & Linh — Wedding Invitation
meta.description: You are cordially invited to celebrate the wedding of Minh & Linh — December 20, 2025.

groom.name: Minh
groom.description: A dreamer who found his forever in her smile. Passionate about life, love, and building a beautiful future together.

bride.name: Linh
bride.description: A gentle soul with a radiant heart. She believes in fairy tales — because she's living one.

ceremony.title: The Ceremony
ceremony.venue: Grand Palace Hall, Ho Chi Minh City

timeline.title: First Meeting
timeline.description: A chance encounter at a quiet coffee shop turned into hours of conversation — and the beginning of forever.

timeline.title: First Date
timeline.description: A sunset walk along the river, nervous laughter, and the quiet realization that this was something extraordinary.

timeline.title: The Proposal
timeline.description: Under a sky full of stars, one knee touched the ground and two hearts became one promise.

timeline.title: Forever Begins
timeline.description: The day we say "I do" — and begin our greatest adventure together.

wishes.author: Thanh Nguyen
wishes.message: Wishing you both a lifetime of love, laughter, and endless happiness. You two are perfect together.

wishes.author: Hoa Tran
wishes.message: May your love grow stronger with each passing day. So incredibly happy for you both!

wishes.author: Duc Le
wishes.message: Two beautiful souls becoming one. Here's to your forever journey — cheers to love!

hero.backgroundAlt: Romantic wedding venue bathed in golden light
